opportunities.web_prompt:
# Lead Generation Website Build — Mold remediation in Burnie TAS

## Overview
Build a high-converting, mobile-first lead generation website for **Mold remediation** targeting **Burnie TAS**. This is a Rank & Rent site designed to capture leads and forward them to a local service provider for a monthly fee of **$5,000**.

## Target Market
- **Location:** Burnie TAS
- **Service:** Mold remediation
- **Average Job Value:** $3,250
- **Urgency Level:** 9/10 (Emergency — immediate response needed)
- **Page Type:** professional_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Mold remediation Burnie TAS"
- Secondary: "best Mold remediation near me", "Mold remediation company Burnie TAS", "affordable Mold remediation Burnie TAS"
- Long-tail: "Mold remediation cost Burnie TAS", "Mold remediation reviews Burnie TAS", "how much does Mold remediation cost in Burnie TAS"

## Domain
**Primary:** moldremediationburnietas.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Burnie TAS
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Mold remediation in Burnie TAS" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Credentials, testimonials, process explanation, FAQ section
- **Urgency:** 24/7 Emergency Service
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Burnie TAS address
- **H1:** Exactly "Mold remediation Burnie TAS" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /mold-remediation-burnie-tas/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Burnie TAS
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to moldremediationburnietas.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Mold remediation cost in Burnie TAS?"
  2. "How long does Mold remediation take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Mold remediation?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

## Target Market
- **Location:** Warren MI
- **Service:** Fence staining
- **Average Job Value:** $3,000
- **Urgency Level:** 3/10 (Standard — 24-48hr response)
- **Page Type:** professional_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Fence staining Warren MI"
- Secondary: "best Fence staining near me", "Fence staining company Warren MI", "affordable Fence staining Warren MI"
- Long-tail: "Fence staining cost Warren MI", "Fence staining reviews Warren MI", "how much does Fence staining cost in Warren MI"

## Domain
**Primary:** fencestainingwarrenmi.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Warren MI
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Fence staining in Warren MI" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Consultation / Get Started)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Credentials, testimonials, process explanation, FAQ section
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Warren MI address
- **H1:** Exactly "Fence staining Warren MI" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /fence-staining-warren-mi/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Warren MI
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to fencestainingwarrenmi.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Fence staining cost in Warren MI?"
  2. "How long does Fence staining take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Fence staining?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client

This is a recurring service — include a subscription/membership CTA option.

---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

Build a high-converting, mobile-first lead generation website for **Solar panel installation** targeting **Pasadena TX**. This is a Rank & Rent site designed to capture leads and forward them to a local service provider for a monthly fee of **$5,000**.

## Target Market
- **Location:** Pasadena TX
- **Service:** Solar panel installation
- **Average Job Value:** $32,500
- **Urgency Level:** 3/10 (Standard — 24-48hr response)
- **Page Type:** installation_service

## Primary Keywords to Target
- Main: "Solar panel installation Pasadena TX"
- Secondary: "best Solar panel installation near me", "Solar panel installation company Pasadena TX", "affordable Solar panel installation Pasadena TX"
- Long-tail: "Solar panel installation cost Pasadena TX", "Solar panel installation reviews Pasadena TX", "how much does Solar panel installation cost in Pasadena TX"

## Domain
**Primary:** solarpanelinstallationpasadenatx.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Pasadena TX
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Solar panel installation in Pasadena TX" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Free Estimate / Schedule Consultation)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** Portfolio gallery, manufacturer certifications, warranty info, financing available
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Pasadena TX address
- **H1:** Exactly "Solar panel installation Pasadena TX" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /solar-panel-installation-pasadena-tx/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Pasadena TX
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack
- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to solarpanelinstallationpasadenatx.com via DNS

## Lead Forwarding Setup
- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

## Content Guidelines
- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
- **Length:** 800-1200 words on homepage, 500+ on service pages
- **FAQ Questions:**
  1. "How much does Solar panel installation cost in Pasadena TX?"
  2. "How long does Solar panel installation take?"
  3. "Do you offer free estimates?"
  4. "Are you licensed and insured?"
  5. "What areas do you serve?"
  6. "Do you offer emergency Solar panel installation?"
  7. "What payment options do you accept?"

## Deliverables
1. Complete static website (HTML/CSS/JS)
2. Responsive design (mobile-first)
3. Contact form with validation
4. Google Analytics installed
5. Search Console submitted
6. LocalBusiness schema markup
7. 5 blog article drafts (300-500 words each)
8. README with deployment instructions

## Success Metrics
- **Target:** First lead within 30 days of going live
- **Goal:** 5+ leads/month within 90 days
- **Monthly Fee:** $5,000/month from client



---
**Budget Estimate:** $200-500 for initial build (one-time)
**Monthly Maintenance:** $50-100 (content updates, monitoring)

3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in Salt Lake City UT
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Commercial snow removal in Salt Lake City UT" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Call Now for Immediate Help / Get a Free Quote)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** 24/7 availability badge, response time guarantee, before/after photos, insurance accepted
- **Urgency:** Same Day Appointments Available
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with Salt Lake City UT address
- **H1:** Exactly "Commercial snow removal Salt Lake City UT" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /commercial-snow-removal-salt-lake-city-ut/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for Salt Lake City UT
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

## Technical Stack

- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)

- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar

- **Page Type:** emergency_service

- Main: "Burst pipe repair San Mateo CA"
- Secondary: "best Burst pipe repair near me", "Burst pipe repair company San Mateo CA", "affordable Burst pipe repair San Mateo CA"
- Long-tail: "Burst pipe repair cost San Mateo CA", "Burst pipe repair reviews San Mateo CA", "how much does Burst pipe repair cost in San Mateo CA"

## Domain
**Primary:** burstpiperepairsanmateoca.com
(Verify availability before building)

## Page Structure
### Required Pages
1. **Homepage** — Hero + trust signals + service overview + CTA + FAQ
2. **Services** — Detailed service page with pricing context
3. **About** — Company story, credentials, service area
4. **Contact** — Form + phone + map + hours
5. **Areas We Serve** — List of suburbs/neighborhoods in San Mateo CA
6. **Blog** — 3-5 seed articles targeting long-tail keywords

### Homepage Sections (Top to Bottom)
1. **Sticky Header** — Logo + Phone number (click-to-call) + CTA button
2. **Hero Section** — H1: "Burst pipe repair in San Mateo CA" + subheadline with benefit + 2 CTAs (Call Now for Immediate Help / Get a Free Quote)
3. **Trust Bar** — 3 trust badges (e.g., "Licensed & Insured", "Same Day Service", "Free Estimates")
4. **Services Grid** — 3-6 service cards with icons
5. **Why Choose Us** — 3-4 differentiators with icons
6. **Social Proof** — Testimonials (use realistic placeholder names/cities)
7. **FAQ Accordion** — 5-7 common questions (great for SEO + voice search)
8. **CTA Banner** — Secondary conversion push
9. **Footer** — Full nav + contact + service areas + social links

## Design Requirements
- **Style:** Clean, professional, high-trust. Avoid templates.
- **Colors:** Blue + white + orange accents (proven conversion colors)
- **Typography:** Sans-serif, large readable text, clear hierarchy
- **Mobile:** 70%+ traffic will be mobile — optimize for thumbs, click-to-call prominent
- **Speed:** Target <2s load time. Optimize images, minify CSS/JS
- **Accessibility:** WCAG 2.1 AA compliant

## Conversion Optimization
- **Above the fold:** Phone number + form visible without scrolling
- **Click-to-call:** Every phone number is a tap-to-call link
- **Form:** Name + Phone + Service Needed + Address (4 fields max)
- **Trust signals:** 24/7 availability badge, response time guarantee, before/after photos, insurance accepted
- **Urgency:** 24/7 Emergency Service
- **Social proof:** 3+ testimonials with photos, star ratings
- **Risk reversal:** "Free Quote", "No Obligation", "Satisfaction Guaranteed"

## SEO Requirements
- **Meta:** Unique title + description for every page
- **Schema:** LocalBusiness structured data with San Mateo CA address
- **H1:** Exactly "Burst pipe repair San Mateo CA" on homepage
- **Internal linking:** Every page links to contact page
- **Image alt text:** Descriptive, keyword-rich
- **URL structure:** /burst-pipe-repair-san-mateo-ca/
- **Local content:** Mention specific neighborhoods, landmarks, weather/seasonal context for San Mateo CA
- **FAQ Schema:** Mark up FAQ section for rich snippets

- **Static HTML/CSS/JS** (no CMS needed for lead gen)
- **Form handling:** Use Formspree, Basin, or similar (forward to email)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console
- **Hosting:** Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages (free SSL + CDN)
- **Domain:** Connect to burstpiperepairsanmateoca.com via DNS

- Form submissions → Email to [your email]
- Phone number → Forward to [client's phone] via Google Voice or similar
- Set up tracking: Use unique phone number per site to measure call volume

- **Tone:** Professional but approachable
